zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Bennett於1694年9月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其時，她的父親Henry Bennett31歲，母親Margaret27歲。她於1715年11月3日與Captain Wallace Finlayson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1765年12月9日在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛享年71歲，埋葬在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Bennett于1694年9月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲Henry Bennett31岁，母亲Margaret27岁。她于1715年11月3日与Captain Wallace Finlayson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1765年12月9日在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛享年71岁，埋葬在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Bennett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Benedict , from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. In the 12th century the Latin form of the name is found in England alongside versions derived from the Old French form Beneit, Benoit, which was common among the Normans. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Bernhard  .
Altered form of French Benet or Bennet or of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Bennetts
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant of Bennett , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Dittus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.
German: from a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Benedictus (see Bennett ).

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bennight
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Bennett  .

variants.name: Bennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Bene(i)t + -son. See Bennett and compare Benson .

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Bennett was born on 8 September 1694, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Henry Bennett, was 31 and her mother, Margaret, was 27. She married Captain Wallace Finlayson on 3 November 1715, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 December 1765, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States, at the age of 71, and was buried in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Bennett est née le 8 septembre 1694, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Bennett, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Captain Wallace Finlayson le 3 novembre 1715, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 décembre 1765, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Bennett am 8. September 1694 in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Bennett 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret 27. Sie hat am 3. November 1715 in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Captain Wallace Finlayson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Dezember 1765 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Bennett è nata il il 8 settembre 1694 nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Henry Bennett, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Captain Wallace Finlayson il 3 novembre 1715, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1765, nel Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Bennettが1694年9月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Henry Bennettは31歳，母Margaretは27歳であった。1715年11月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスでCaptain Wallace Finlaysonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1765年12月9日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウで71歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Frances Bennett(이)가 1694년 9월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Bennett(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1715년 11월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 Captain Wallace Finlayson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1765년 12월 9일 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.8 September 1694–9 December 1765: 8 de setembro de 1694–9 de dezembro de 1765

pt.Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colon: Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colonial America
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Bennett nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1694, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Bennett, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Captain Wallace Finlayson em 3 de novembro de 1715, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1765, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colon: порцмоут, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Bennett родилась 8 сентября 1694 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Henry Bennett было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Captain Wallace Finlayson 3 ноября 1715 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 декабря 1765 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frances Bennett nació el 8 de septiembre de 1694, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Bennett, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Captain Wallace Finlayson el 3 de noviembre de 1715, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1765, en Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos.
